title: Hank's Christmas Wish 2: The Nutcracker
overview: In the charming small town of Buckhannon, WV, Hank the Christmas Elf returns to bring the holiday spirit to life by organizing a community production of The Nutcracker. With the help of a lively dance studio owner and the town's enthusiastic mayor, Hank aims to create a festive event that will unite everyone and rekindle the joy of the season.
